transform_expr: case when lower(status) like '%scheduled%' then 'scheduled' when lower(status) like '%in_progress%' then 'in_progress' when lower(status) like '%pending_feedback%' then 'pending_feedback' when lower(status) like '%completed%' then 'completed' when lower(status) like '%cancelled%' then 'cancelled' when lower(status) like '%requested%' then 'requested' else lower(status) end
